title: mikania tysonii
intro: Mikania tysonii, also known as Tyson's crinum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mikania tysonii include its ability to treat fever, cough, and cold, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Mikania tysonii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water, creating a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
